scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && node -e "require('fs').mkdirSync('dist/llm',{recursive:true}); require('fs').copyFileSync('src/llm/llm.yaml','dist/llm/llm.yaml');" && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p='dist/insight/template'; fs.mkdirSync(p,{recursive:true}); fs.mkdirSync(p+'/images',{recursive:true}); fs.copyFileSync('src/insight/template/sessionbridge-report.html', p+'/sessionbridge-report.html'); fs.copyFileSync('src/insight/template/myself-lately-report.html', p+'/myself-lately-report.html'); fs.copyFileSync('src/insight/template/styles.css', p+'/styles.css'); const imgs=fs.readdirSync('src/insight/template/images'); imgs.forEach(f=>fs.copyFileSync('src/insight/template/images/'+f, p+'/images/'+f));" && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); function copyMdTree(src,dst){fs.mkdirSync(dst,{recursive:true}); for(const e of fs.readdirSync(src,{withFileTypes:true})){const s=path.join(src,e.name); const d=path.join(dst,e.name); if(e.isDirectory()){copyMdTree(s,d);} else if(e.isFile() && e.name.endsWith('.md')){fs.copyFileSync(s,d);}}}; copyMdTree('src/insight/prompts','dist/insight/prompts');" && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const p='dist/guides'; fs.mkdirSync(p,{recursive:true}); fs.copyFileSync('src/guides/user_guide.md', p+'/user_guide.md'); fs.copyFileSync('src/guides/admin_guide.md', p+'/admin_guide.md');" && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.mkdirSync('dist/engagement/checkin',{recursive:true}); fs.copyFileSync('src/engagement/checkin/checkin.yaml','dist/engagement/checkin/checkin.yaml');" && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); fs.mkdirSync('dist/engagement/nudge',{recursive:true}); fs.copyFileSync('src/engagement/nudge/nudge.yaml','dist/engagement/nudge/nudge.yaml');"
